有热血火拼，也有尔虞我诈，更重要的是兄弟们都在身边！
各位老铁可以放心观看，绝对带来不一样的感受！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772289226,"group_id":"7596264475536133144","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请多多支持流浪的新书！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/2hcSSggTeW2aKBuQbCQGtsvVPHc7L3CL1zwobrtkhw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00722147a438485b922fd019ecd27785~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615422&x-signature=7H96GrDpXeIj%2F7YmnQtS8huV1%2BE%3D","user_id":"3956481032201658","user_name":"流浪一世界"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3956481032201658","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596264475536133144","book_info":{"abstract":"【黑道】【兄弟齐心】【烧脑文】【激情热血】
三年牢狱，磨不掉一身锋芒。
我叫王枭，因得罪大人物入狱三年。
出狱后，我带着兄弟和师父传的本事，重回故地。
有人想踩我头上，有人想背后捅刀，还有藏在暗处的仇家虎视眈眈。
但这条命早就不是谁都能拿走的。
兄弟在侧，热血未凉。
秦城该变天了。
这一次我要让所有人记住。
王枭的名字是用血与拳头刻出来的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/a4865d222858c83e1ec19fb20b36203b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"流浪一世界","author_id":"","book_id":"7596264475536133144","book_name":"江湖：我即为枭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4568人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596266312708391448","read_count":"4568","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"294700"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"89","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,第一人称,武侠,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a4865d222858c83e1ec19fb20b36203b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272903&x-signature=nfYSEeNh1cqcG749QODF9Itu%2F3A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3956481032201658","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321182823D69E7939150FFC22D7D7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0
